_comment: Zenoti API — formal schema contract for KPI Platform. This file is the ground truth for expected field names and types. When Zenoti changes its API, update this file FIRST and review all pipeline code before the next run.
_last_validated: UNCALIBRATED — update when Zenoti API access is granted

endpoint_appointments.description: Appointment/service records for a given location and date range

required_fields.notes: Maps to KPI location ID via zenoti_center_map.json
Gross service revenue for this appointment
Number of guests on this appointment
Stylist identifier — maps to stylist records
e.g., Closed, Cancelled, No-Show — filter to Closed only

optional_fields.notes: e.g., Wax, Color, Treatment — used for service mix

endpoint_appointments._note: If record count < 50% of prior week's count, abort and alert before any write.

endpoint_stylists.description: Stylist/therapist records for a given center

required_fields.notes: Which location this stylist belongs to
Filter inactive stylists from KPI calculations

validation_rules.on_schema_change: Log specific field discrepancy and abort pipeline — do not process malformed data
validation_rules.required_field_missing: ABORT — raise SchemaValidationError with field name
validation_rules.type_mismatch: WARN and attempt safe cast — if cast fails, ABORT
validation_rules.record_count_below_50pct_of_prior_week: ABORT — never overwrite good data with partial data
